response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack experience, deep systems thinking, and hands-on work with distributed systems and AI-agent infrastructure — aligning well with the role’s technical and operational demands. His ownership of open-source projects and agile practices reflect an ideal mindset, though his lack of explicit Python mastery and limited evidence of AI-native engineering environments are notable gaps.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Strong track record in building high-throughput, distributed systems (e.g., microservices handling millions of requests/sec)
Demonstrated operational ownership via open-source projects, CI/CD setup, and on-call-like maintenance of critical systems
concerns: No explicit mention of Python mastery — critical for the role’s must-have skills
Limited evidence of direct experience with LLMs or AI-native code generation environments beyond MCP frameworks
Current role at re:cinq starts in April 2025 (future-dated), raising questions about timeline accuracy
